prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny feature workflow, then complete it end to end without waiting for more user input. Add a subtract helper to the calculator fixture, cover it with tests, update the fixture README with a short subtract example, and finish with verification plus review status. Choose the minimum required subagent set yourself; do not ask me which required agent to use.
success_criteria: A new subtract helper is implemented in the calculator fixture
Tests were added or updated and executed successfully
The fixture README was updated with a subtract example
The workflow completes without asking the user to choose mandatory agents
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
forbidden_transcript_patterns: would you like me to start with (the )?(explorer|architect|tester|code reviewer)
